meta.name: UWES-9 Utrecht Work Engagement Scale
meta.description: The UWES-9 is a 9-item scale measuring three dimensions of work engagement: vigor, dedication, and absorption.
meta.author: Schaufeli WB, Bakker AB (2003)
meta.reference: Schaufeli WB, Bakker AB, Salanova M. The measurement of work engagement with a short questionnaire. Educ Psychol Meas. 2006;66(4):701-716.
meta.instruction: The following statements are about how you feel at work. Please read each statement carefully and decide if you ever feel this way about your job.

commonChoices.label: Almost never (a few times a year or less)
Very often (a few times a week)

questions.text: At my work, I feel bursting with energy.
I find the work that I do full of meaning and purpose.
Time flies when I am working.
At my job, I feel strong and vigorous.
I am enthusiastic about my job.
When I am working, I forget everything else around me.
When I get up in the morning, I feel like going to work.
I feel happy when I am working intensely.

ranges.label: Low Work Engagement
ranges.description: Your work engagement level is low. You may lack enthusiasm and motivation at work. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Reflect on whether your work aligns with your personal values
Discuss work content adjustments with your supervisor
Identify aspects of your work that bring a sense of achievement
Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging

ranges.label: Moderate Work Engagement
ranges.description: Your work engagement is at a moderate level. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Try setting challenging goals at work
Develop social relationships in the workplace
Seek more autonomy and growth opportunities
Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others

ranges.label: High Work Engagement
ranges.description: Your work engagement is high. You are full of vigor, dedication, and absorption in your work. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Continue maintaining high work engagement
Be mindful of work-life balance to prevent burnout
Help colleagues enhance their work engagement
Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others

vigor.label: Low Vigor
vigor.description: You lack energy and vitality at work, possibly feeling exhausted and unmotivated. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging
Explore new interests and activities
Practice a gratitude journal, focusing on positive aspects of life
If you consistently feel unmotivated, consider consulting a professional

vigor.label: Moderate Vigor
vigor.description: You have some energy at work, though it may fluctuate. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others
Helping others is also an effective way to enhance well-being
Continue developing personal interests and social networks

vigor.label: High Vigor
vigor.description: You are full of energy, vitality, and resilience at work. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others
Maintain gratitude and mindfulness practices
Focus on continued growth and deepening life meaning

dedication.label: Low Dedication
dedication.description: You lack enthusiasm and identification with your work, possibly feeling it is meaningless. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging
Explore new interests and activities
Practice a gratitude journal, focusing on positive aspects of life
If you consistently feel unmotivated, consider consulting a professional

dedication.label: Moderate Dedication
dedication.description: You have some enthusiasm and commitment to your work, with room for growth. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others
Helping others is also an effective way to enhance well-being
Continue developing personal interests and social networks

dedication.label: High Dedication
dedication.description: You are passionate and proud of your work, finding it highly meaningful. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others
Maintain gratitude and mindfulness practices
Focus on continued growth and deepening life meaning

absorption.label: Low Absorption
absorption.description: You find it difficult to concentrate at work and are easily distracted. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Try doing one fulfilling activity each day
Stay connected with friends and family to build a sense of belonging
Explore new interests and activities
Practice a gratitude journal, focusing on positive aspects of life
If you consistently feel unmotivated, consider consulting a professional

absorption.label: Moderate Absorption
absorption.description: You can maintain some focus at work, though occasional distractions occur. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your positive lifestyle
Share your experiences and positive feelings with others
Helping others is also an effective way to enhance well-being
Continue developing personal interests and social networks

absorption.label: High Absorption
absorption.description: You are highly focused and immersed in your work, fully engaged. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others
Maintain gratitude and mindfulness practices
Focus on continued growth and deepening life meaning
